Scout.description: Markers placed on the map will generate radar scans every 2.0s. Reduces range at which enemies can detect the wearer by 30%.

Fortified.description: Further reduces recoil when crouching or prone by 30%. Provides 50% resistance to explosive damage.

Engineering Kit.description: Further Reduces recoil when crouching or prone by 30%. Increases initial inventory and holding capacity of grenades by +2.

Med-Kit.description: Increases initial inventory and holding capacity of stims by +2. Increases stim effect duration by 2.0s.

Servo-Assisted.description: Increases throwing range by 30%. Provides +50% limb health.

Democracy Protects.description: 50% chance to not die when taking lethal damage. Prevents all damage from bleeding if chest hemorrhages.

Peak Physique.description: Increased Melee Damage by 50%. Improves weapons handling with less drag on the weapon movement.

Inflammable.description: Provides 75% damage resistance to fire, allowing bearer to rest assured in the inflammability.

Advanced Filtration.description: Provides 80% resistance to gas damage and effects.

Unflinching.description: Helps prevent Helldivers from flinching when hit.

Siege-ready.description: Increases reload speed of primary weapons by 30%. Increases ammo capacity of primary weapons by 20%.

Gunslinger.description: Increases weapon swap speed by 50%. Increases pistol damage by 30%.

Supplementary Adrenaline.description: Provides a burst of speed after taking damage. +15% movement speed for 3s after being hit.

Concussive Padding.description: Reduces stagger duration by 50%. Provides 30% resistance to concussive damage.

Feet First.description: Reduces Hellpod drop time by 50%. Provides brief invulnerability on landing.

Desert Stormer.description: Provides 50% resistance to heat effects. Reduces stamina drain in hot environments.

Rock Solid.description: Provides 75% resistance to knockback from explosions and heavy impacts.

Reduced Signature.description: Reduces detection range by 40%. Enemies take longer to spot the wearer.

Ballistic Padding.description: Provides 30% resistance to ballistic damage. Reduces bullet stagger.

Ground Anchor.description: Provides extreme knockback resistance. Wearer stays planted during heavy impacts and explosions.

Integrated Explosives.description: Upon death, the wearer detonates in an explosion that damages nearby enemies.

Reinforced Epaulettes.description: Boosts survivability with reinforced shoulder protection.

Adreno-Defibrillator.description: If you take lethal damage, you are instantly revived to full health, but you will continually bleed out afterward.
